AFLIBER Atlas of the Flora Iberica Database
To access the dataset head to Dryad Digital Repository


 Access the datapaper




Visualize AFLIBER data interactively at afliber.shinyapps.io/afliber


Read the compilation process of the first version of this dataset at [Global Ecology and Biogeography] (https://doi.org/10.1111/geb.13363).
